name: Good Guys & Bad Boys Zombie Survival GUI
description: Survive waves of zombies in Good Guys & Bad Boys Zombie Survival GUI, a fast shooting game with action-packed Unity gameplay. Move with WASD, aim and shoot with the mouse, switch guns, jump, and stay alert as enemies close in. Test your reflexes, manage your weapons, and fight to stay alive in every intense round on the battlefield today online. Web Dev https://www.coolcrazygames.com/
instructions: wasd to move mouse to shooting aim and change gun tab for menu space for jump
